name: install_ecoute_package
description: Autonomously installs and configures the 'mikehins/ecoute' package in a Laravel environment. This includes dependency management, bootstrapping (publishing assets, running migrations), and validation checks.

run_migrations.description: Whether to run migrations immediately after installation.

publish_templates.description: Whether to publish the .github issue templates provided by the package.

force.description: Force the publishing of assets and configuration even if they already exist.

intent: I want to install and configure the Ecoute package to capture DOM context and transform it into structured issues.
constraints: NEVER run 'composer update'. Only use 'composer require' to add the package.
Ensure the environment is a valid Laravel project by checking for 'artisan' and 'composer.json' with 'laravel/framework'.
Verify compatibility: Requires PHP ^8.1 and Laravel ^10.0|^11.0|^12.0|^13.0.

steps.logic: Check for the existence of './artisan' and a 'composer.json' file. Parse 'composer.json' to ensure 'laravel/framework' is present in the 'require' section.

steps.error_handling: If a version mismatch occurs (e.g., Laravel < 10.0), abort and report the specific version conflict to the user.

checks.description: Verify the configuration file was created.
Verify package commands are registered in Artisan.
